{{Quote|Sir, this is Captain Boultan, CDF, groundside. My unit was attempting to get to the CDF barracks in the navy yard to collect our riot equipment. The spaceside service has secured the base. I'm pretty sure that I saw people in New Republic uniforms assisting them.|Boultan|<ref name="Ambush at Corellia" />}}
[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] '''Boultan''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] officer of the [[Corellian Defense Force/Legends|Corellian Defense Force]].

==Biography==
As the [[Corellian Crisis|First Corellian Insurrection]] ignited, it became obvious that the groundside CDF remained loyal to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], while the spaceside CDF, staffed with many ex-Imperial military, had joined with the [[Human League]] and the insurgents. Boultan's unit was being led back to the barracks to collect riot gear and found the building secured by CDF spaceside.<ref name="Ambush at Corellia" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Ambush at Corellia]]'' {{1st}}
